methodsAttempted.query: site:nycu.edu.tw 國立陽明交通大學 生成式AI 指引 教學 評量 ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Public web search located the official Academic Ethics and Research Integrity Office hub page and three May 2023 official PDF documents on NYCU's response to generative AI.

methodsAttempted.query: site:nycu.edu.tw NYCU generative AI policy students ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: English and mixed-language search mainly returned official event, course, research-showcase, and department pages; these were not used as policy evidence.

methodsAttempted.query: Firecrawl search for official NYCU GenAI policy sources
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search was attempted first but returned HTTP 402 in this worker environment. No Firecrawl result, snippet, or extraction was used as evidence.
Direct official-domain PDF fetches from www.nycu.edu.tw succeeded. robots.txt returned 404, so no explicit disallow was found.
The OAERI official hub page and one OAERI-hosted PDF fetched successfully with a browser-like user agent. robots.txt returned 404, so no explicit disallow was found.

artifacts.summary: Official NYCU OAERI sources support narrow claims about the university's May 2023 GenAI statement, teaching suggestions, privacy/information-security cautions, course-rule disclosure guidance, and research-use reference principles. Official event, research-showcase, and library-blog items were rejected because they did not provide institution-level policy or guidance evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立陽明交通大學對生成式 AI 之基本立場及應用於教學之聲明
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
人工智慧技術的發展及應用是未來趨勢，國立陽明交通大學（以下簡稱本校）作為頂尖研究型大學之一，具備電機、資訊、生物醫學等跨領域研發優勢，鼓勵師生積極進行前瞻性的研究及技術開發，但仍須提醒師生同時關注相關倫理及法律議題，故對生成式 AI 工具（如 ChatGPT）於大學教與學的影響，特提出如下之基本立場與建議。
（一）秉持開放、包容的態度看待新興科技
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The statement frames AI development as a future trend, encourages forward-looking research and development, reminds teachers and students to consider ethical and legal issues, and says NYCU takes an open, inclusive attitude toward emerging technology.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 國立陽明交通大學對生成式 AI 之基本立場及應用於教學之聲明
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立陽明交通大學對生成式 AI 之基本立場及應用於教學之聲明
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
（二）留意隱私權與資訊安全
將生成式 AI 用於教學或學習時，師生應留意個人隱私與資訊安全，避免在生成式 AI 中輸入自己或他人之隱私資訊，以降低個人資訊外洩的風險。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The statement tells teachers and students to pay attention to privacy and information security and avoid entering their own or others' private information into GenAI.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 國立陽明交通大學對生成式 AI 之基本立場及應用於教學之聲明
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立陽明交通大學教師應用生成式 AI 之教學建議
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 教師於撰寫課程大綱時，除了清楚敘明學習目標與作業評量方式外，建議聲明生成式 AI 的使用規範，讓學生知悉課程是否可以利用生成式 AI 作為輔助學習工具，或者協助作業內容之完成，以及應用生成式 AI 對教師評量學生作業成績之影響。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The teacher guidance recommends that syllabi state GenAI use rules so students know whether AI can be used as a learning or assignment aid and how AI use affects grading.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 國立陽明交通大學教師應用生成式 AI 之教學建議
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立陽明交通大學生成式 AI 用於學術研究之參考指引
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
故勿過度仰賴或全盤接受生成式 AI 產出之內容。
AI 生成的內容基於各種編解碼過程或是機率統計的組合，並非來自對原始資料的深入研究或邏輯推理的結果，且目前生成式 AI 生成之內容尚未能清楚註明資料來源，故研究者需要對其論述進行查證，以確保其內容正確性。
而以應用生成式 AI 作為輔助研究，應先瞭解學術研究機構、經費補助機關（構）、期刊及研討會等對生成式 AI 發布之相關政策，並於計畫補助申請及學術成果發表時，適當公開相關訊息
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The research guidance says not to over-rely on or fully accept GenAI output, to verify AI-generated arguments because sources may be unclear, and to disclose relevant information when required by institutional, funder, journal, or conference policies.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Research reference guidelines, page 1, sections I-III
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a source-status claim only; the official OAERI page directly lists the three NYCU GenAI documents.
Approved with wording limited to the basic-position statement's open/inclusive stance and ethics/legal caution.
Approved because the source directly states privacy and information-security cautions for GenAI teaching or learning use.
Approved with narrow wording around recommended syllabus disclosure, not a binding universal ban or permission rule.
Approved as reference-guidance wording; not framed as a binding research misconduct rule.

artifacts.title: National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University GenAI Guidance Source Review
artifacts.summary: Staged source review found official NYCU OAERI GenAI documents from May 2023 covering the university's basic position on GenAI in teaching and learning, faculty teaching suggestions, privacy and information-security cautions, and reference guidance for GenAI use in academic research. Claims are intentionally limited to the official source language and are not published as canonical claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The strongest sources found are Chinese-language May 2023 NYCU OAERI documents. No separate current student handbook rule or approved-tool list was found in this pass.
Event, course, research-showcase, and library-blog items discovered during search were not used as policy evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
